properties.comment: 03:00 UTC: late enough that all operators' previous-day files have landed, early enough for Finance's morning.

properties.description: Run at close_lag_days into month N+1. Re-runs every business_date of month N with latest data (restatement), then flips recon_period_control to 'closed' so the month is frozen.

activities.name: RestateAllDaysInPeriod
activities.comment: Idempotent re-run of each day in the period with the latest silver data (absorbs in-period late arrivals). Open month => partition overwrite is allowed.

linked_services_required: ls_databricks  (Azure Databricks, job cluster, Photon on; autoscale 2-8 workers)
ls_adls_gen2   (ADLS Gen2, abfss, managed identity auth)
orchestration_notes: ForEach over operators runs land+bronze in parallel (batchCount 8) — independent operators never block each other; one bad feed fails only its branch.
Silver/gold are single Databricks tasks that read all operators at once (UNION ALL) — fewer, larger Spark jobs beat 7 tiny ones for shuffle efficiency.
All Databricks tasks are re-runnable: bronze/silver MERGE upsert, gold partition-overwrite. Re-triggering pl_recon_daily for an old date is safe and idempotent (subject to closed-month guard).
The DQ_TieOutGate hard-stops publish if the summary mart and detail fact disagree — Finance never sees an un-tied number.
Backfill = trigger pl_recon_daily across a date range (Tumbling-window trigger or a ForEach of dates). Closed months are protected automatically.
